mapper.sql: SELECT branch_id, primary_branch, secondary_branch, branch_code, city, grid_code, district_name, street, address, longitude, latitude, total_staff, personal_manager, corporate_manager, counter_staff, lobby_staff, branch_manager, manager_tenure, manager_resume, manager_history, total_area, other_floor_area, cash_counter, non_cash_counter, manager_seat, property_right, lease_expire, last_renovation, branch_type, relocation, data_source, del_flag, create_time, update_time FROM jw_branch_info
mapper.select: WHERE city = #{city} AND (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag = '0') ORDER BY branch_id
WHERE grid_code = #{gridCode} AND (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag = '0') ORDER BY branch_id
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM jw_branch_info WHERE (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag = '0') ORDER BY city
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_branch_info ( primary_branch, secondary_branch, branch_code, city, grid_code, district_name, street, address, longitude, latitude, total_staff, personal_manager, corporate_manager, counter_staff, lobby_staff, branch_manager, manager_tenure, manager_resume, manager_history, total_area, other_floor_area, cash_counter, non_cash_counter, manager_seat, property_right, lease_expire, last_renovation, branch_type, relocation, data_source, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{primaryBranch}, #{secondaryBranch}, #{branchCode}, #{city}, #{gridCode}, #{districtName}, #{street}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{totalStaff}, #{personalManager}, #{corporateManager}, #{counterStaff}, #{lobbyStaff}, #{branchManager}, #{managerTenure}, #{managerResume}, #{managerHistory}, #{totalArea}, #{otherFloorArea}, #{cashCounter}, #{nonCashCounter}, #{managerSeat}, #{propertyRight}, #{leaseExpire}, #{lastRenovation}, #{branchType}, #{relocation}, #{dataSource}, #{delFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate() )

INSERT INTO jw_branch_info ( primary_branch, secondary_branch, branch_code, city, grid_code, district_name, street, address, longitude, latitude, total_staff, personal_manager, corporate_manager, counter_staff, lobby_staff, branch_manager, manager_tenure, manager_resume, manager_history, total_area, other_floor_area, cash_counter, non_cash_counter, manager_seat, property_right, lease_expire, last_renovation, branch_type, relocation, data_source, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{primaryBranch}, #{secondaryBranch}, #{branchCode}, #{city}, #{gridCode}, #{districtName}, #{street}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{totalStaff}, #{personalManager}, #{corporateManager}, #{counterStaff}, #{lobbyStaff}, #{branchManager}, #{managerTenure}, #{managerResume}, #{managerHistory}, #{totalArea}, #{otherFloorArea}, #{cashCounter}, #{nonCashCounter}, #{managerSeat}, #{propertyRight}, #{leaseExpire}, #{lastRenovation}, #{branchType}, #{relocation}, #{dataSource}, #{delFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_branch_info WHERE branch_id IN
#{branchId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_branch_info ( primary_branch, secondary_branch, branch_code, city, grid_code, district_name, street, address, longitude, latitude, total_staff, personal_manager, corporate_manager, counter_staff, lobby_staff, branch_manager, manager_tenure, manager_resume, manager_history, total_area, other_floor_area, cash_counter, non_cash_counter, manager_seat, property_right, lease_expire, last_renovation, branch_type, relocation, data_source, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.primaryBranch}, #{item.secondaryBranch}, #{item.branchCode}, #{item.city}, #{item.gridCode}, #{item.districtName}, #{item.street}, #{item.address}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.totalStaff}, #{item.personalManager}, #{item.corporateManager}, #{item.counterStaff}, #{item.lobbyStaff}, #{item.branchManager}, #{item.managerTenure}, #{item.managerResume}, #{item.managerHistory}, #{item.totalArea}, #{item.otherFloorArea}, #{item.cashCounter}, #{item.nonCashCounter}, #{item.managerSeat}, #{item.propertyRight}, #{item.leaseExpire}, #{item.lastRenovation}, #{item.branchType}, #{item.relocation}, #{item.dataSource}, #{item.delFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate())

INSERT INTO jw_branch_info ( primary_branch, secondary_branch, branch_code, city, grid_code, district_name, street, address, longitude, latitude, total_staff, personal_manager, corporate_manager, counter_staff, lobby_staff, branch_manager, manager_tenure, manager_resume, manager_history, total_area, other_floor_area, cash_counter, non_cash_counter, manager_seat, property_right, lease_expire, last_renovation, branch_type, relocation, data_source, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{primaryBranch}, #{secondaryBranch}, #{branchCode}, #{city}, #{gridCode}, #{districtName}, #{street}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{totalStaff}, #{personalManager}, #{corporateManager}, #{counterStaff}, #{lobbyStaff}, #{branchManager}, #{managerTenure}, #{managerResume}, #{managerHistory}, #{totalArea}, #{otherFloorArea}, #{cashCounter}, #{nonCashCounter}, #{managerSeat}, #{propertyRight}, #{leaseExpire}, #{lastRenovation}, #{branchType}, #{relocation}, #{dataSource}, #{delFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE primary_branch = VALUES(primary_branch), secondary_branch = VALUES(secondary_branch), city = VALUES(city), grid_code = VALUES(grid_code), district_name = VALUES(district_name), street = VALUES(street), address = VALUES(address), longitude = VALUES(longitude), latitude = VALUES(latitude), total_staff = VALUES(total_staff), personal_manager = VALUES(personal_manager), corporate_manager = VALUES(corporate_manager), counter_staff = VALUES(counter_staff), lobby_staff = VALUES(lobby_staff), branch_manager = VALUES(branch_manager), manager_tenure = VALUES(manager_tenure), manager_resume = VALUES(manager_resume), manager_history = VALUES(manager_history), total_area = VALUES(total_area), other_floor_area = VALUES(other_floor_area), cash_counter = VALUES(cash_counter), non_cash_counter = VALUES(non_cash_counter), manager_seat = VALUES(manager_seat), property_right = VALUES(property_right), lease_expire = VALUES(lease_expire), last_renovation = VALUES(last_renovation), branch_type = VALUES(branch_type), relocation = VALUES(relocation), data_source = VALUES(data_source), update_time = sysdate()
